posts.text: Xi Jinping’s pet project, Xiongan, offers perks to its growing number of residents. posts.text:
Today, US CPI inflation officially hit its highest level in 3 years, yet the Dow closed green. Why?

As inflation accelerates, our 12+ month thesis to "own assets or be left behind" is only gaining more momentum.

I will be joining @ErinBurnett on CNN at 7:00 PM ET tonight to discuss @KobeissiLetter's latest market outlook.

Tune in LIVE at 7:00 PM ET!
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
